summary: Completed testing for Configuration Versioning and Activity Timeline (Audit Trail) feature. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed - Activity Timeline page loads correctly with stats cards, filters, events table, and event detail dialog.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1 - non-blocking but indicates potential layout issue on initial render
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/activity-timeline - list events with pagination (200 OK, returns events array and total)
✅ GET /api/activity-timeline with entity_type filter - correctly filters events
✅ GET /api/activity-timeline with action filter - correctly filters events
✅ GET /api/activity-timeline/stats - returns total_events, by_entity_type, by_action
✅ GET /api/activity-timeline/entity/{entity_type}/{entity_id} - entity-specific history
✅ GET /api/config-versions/{entity_type}/{entity_id} - version history for configs
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/distribution-rules - creates rule with version=1 and created_by
✅ PATCH /api/pricing-engine/distribution-rules/{id} - updates version++, saves snapshot
✅ DELETE /api/pricing-engine/distribution-rules/{id} - saves final snapshot, records delete event
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/channels - creates channel config with versioning
✅ PATCH /api/pricing-engine/channels/{id} - updates with versioning and audit
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/guardrails - creates guardrail with versioning
✅ PATCH /api/pricing-engine/guardrails/{id} - updates with versioning and audit trail
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/promotions - creates promotion with audit trail event
✅ PATCH /api/pricing-engine/promotions/{id} - updates with versioning and audit
✅ POST /api/finance/settlement-runs - creating draft records timeline event
✅ PATCH /api/finance/settlement-runs/{id}/submit - transition records timeline event
✅ PATCH /api/finance/settlement-runs/{id}/approve - approve records timeline event
✅ Activity Timeline page loads at /app/admin/activity-timeline
✅ Activity Timeline page shows stats cards (Toplam Olay: 17)
✅ Activity Timeline page has entity type and action filters
✅ Activity Timeline page shows events table with pagination
✅ Event detail dialog opens correctly with metadata display
✅ Finance Overview page has 'Aktivite Zaman Cizgisi' nav card
seed_data_creation: Created test distribution rules, channel configs, guardrails, promotions, and settlement runs during testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Config Versioning and Activity Timeline fully tested. Activity timeline shows 17 events from various entity types. The system uses two org_ids: user org for pricing engine configs and 'default_org' for finance/settlement data. Timeline query uses $in to include both. All CRUD operations on pricing rules, channels, guardrails, promotions properly record audit events with version tracking. Settlement workflow transitions (created, submitted, approved) also recorded in timeline.

ui_verification.Stats Cards: ✅ Shows Toplam Olay, Koruma Siniri, Uzlasma Islemi, Dagitim Kurali counts
ui_verification.Filters: ✅ Entity type and Action filters work correctly
ui_verification.Events Table: ✅ Shows 17 events with proper columns (Tarih, Aksiyon, Varlik, Kullanici, Detay)
ui_verification.Event Detail Dialog: ✅ Opens with Event ID, Date, User, Action, Entity info, and Metadata
ui_verification.Finance Overview Nav Card: ✅ 'Aktivite Zaman Cizgisi' card visible with correct navigation
